title: glyceria maritima var. deflexa
intro: Glyceria maritima var. deflexa, also known as sea couch or sea bent grass, is a variant of the Glyceria maritima plant, a type of grass that grows in coastal areas. The medicinal properties of Glyceria maritima var. deflexa lie in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and aiding in the treatment of digestive disorders and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Glyceria maritima var. deflexa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to soothe and calm the body.
